info.name: FastAPI Banking System
info.description: Secure banking API for user signup/login, account management, deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and transaction history. Use the /api/login endpoint to obtain a JWT access token and authorize protected endpoints with the Bearer token.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Create a new application user. Passwords are hashed and username must be unique.
Authenticate with username and password to receive an access token. Use the returned Bearer token for protected endpoints via the Authorization header.
Update name or password for the current user. Requires a valid JWT Bearer token.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Deposit money into an active account owned by the authenticated user.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Withdraw money from an active account owned by the authenticated user, if sufficient balance exists.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Soft-close an account owned by the authenticated user. Only accounts with zero balance can be closed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Return all accounts owned by the current user. Requires JWT Bearer authentication.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Create a new account for the authenticated user. Initial balance is always zero.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Transfer funds from one owned account to another active account. Self-transfers are prevented and account ownership is validated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Return transaction history for a specific account owned by the authenticated user.
